sentences.target: Ich vermeide Streit mit meinem Bruder.

translations.de: Ich vermeide Streit mit meinem Bruder.
translations.en: I avoid arguments with my brother.
translations.fr: J’évite les disputes avec mon frère.
translations.it: Evito le discussioni con mio fratello.
translations.zh-Hans: 我尽量避免和我兄弟争吵。
translations.yue: 我盡量唔同我兄弟嗌交。
translations.vi: Tôi tránh cãi nhau với anh trai mình.
translations.nl: Ik vermijd ruzie met mijn broer.
translations.hi: मैं अपने भाई से झगड़ा करने से बचता हूँ।
translations.el: Αποφεύγω τους καβγάδες με τον αδερφό μου.
translations.nb: Jeg unngår krangel med broren min.
translations.sv: Jag undviker bråk med min bror.
translations.cs: Vyhýbám se hádkám se svým bratrem.
translations.da: Jeg undgår at skændes med min bror.
translations.ja: 兄とけんかを避けています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite lexical verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive, taking the direct object 'Streit'.
Masculine noun, bare singular as accusative direct object; generic/indefinite reference.
Preposition governing dative; introduces PP modifying the noun ('Streit mit ...') or the verb.
Possessive determiner, dative masculine singular; modifies 'Bruder'.
Masculine noun, dative singular; object of the preposition 'mit'.

sentences.target: Der Streit ist jetzt zum Glück vorbei.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ ʃtʁaɪ̯t ɪst jɛtst tsʊm ɡlʏk fɔɐ̯ˈbaɪ̯/

translations.de: Der Streit ist jetzt zum Glück vorbei.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ ʃtʁaɪ̯t ɪst jɛtst tsʊm ɡlʏk fɔɐ̯ˈbaɪ̯/
translations.en: The argument is over now, thankfully.
translations.es: Por suerte, la discusión ya terminó.
translations.fr: Heureusement, la dispute est terminée maintenant.
translations.it: Per fortuna, la discussione è finita adesso.
translations.zh-Hans: 幸好现在争吵已经结束了。
translations.yue: 好彩而家嗌交已經完咗。
translations.pt: Ainda bem que a discussão acabou agora.
translations.vi: May quá, cuộc cãi vã giờ đã kết thúc.
translations.nl: Gelukkig is de ruzie nu voorbij.
translations.hu: Szerencsére a vita mostanra véget ért.
translations.hi: शुक्र है, अब झगड़ा खत्म हो गया है।
translations.pl: Na szczęście kłótnia już się skończyła.
translations.sv: Som tur är är bråket över nu.
translations.ro: Din fericire, cearta s-a terminat acum.
translations.cs: Naštěstí je hádka teď už u konce.
translations.ja: ありがたいことに、けんかはもう終わった。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative masculine singular; marks 'Streit' as definite.
Masculine noun, nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Copular auxiliary, present indicative, 3rd person singular; links subject to the predicative complement.
Temporal adverb; situates the state in the present.
Fused preposition ('zu' + 'dem'); part of the PP 'zum Glück' functioning adverbially.
Neuter noun, object of 'zum'; in the fixed expression 'zum Glück' meaning 'fortunately'.
Adverb used as predicative complement; indicates the dispute has ended.

sentences.target: Wir haben wieder Streit wegen des Lärms.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈhaːbən ˈviːdɐ ʃtʁaɪ̯t ˈveːɡən dɛs lɛʁms/

translations.de: Wir haben wieder Streit wegen des Lärms.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈhaːbən ˈviːdɐ ʃtʁaɪ̯t ˈveːɡən dɛs lɛʁms/
translations.en: We’re arguing again because of the noise.
translations.es: Estamos discutiendo otra vez por el ruido.
translations.fr: On se dispute encore à cause du bruit.
translations.it: Stiamo litigando di nuovo per il rumore.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们又因为噪音在吵架。
translations.yue: 我哋又因為噪音喺度嗌交。
translations.pt: Estamos discutindo de novo por causa do barulho.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi lại cãi nhau vì tiếng ồn.
translations.ar: نحن نتشاجر مرة أخرى بسبب الضوضاء.
translations.nl: We maken weer ruzie vanwege het lawaai.
translations.hi: हम फिर से शोर की वजह से बहस कर रहे हैं।
translations.pl: Znowu się kłócimy z powodu hałasu.
translations.nb: Vi krangler igjen på grunn av støyen.
translations.sv: Vi bråkar igen på grund av oljudet.
translations.ro: Ne certăm din nou din cauza zgomotului.
translations.da: Vi skændes igen på grund af støjen.
translations.ja: また騒音のせいで口論している。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite lexical verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; takes the direct object 'Streit'.
Adverb indicating repetition; modifies the clause/verb.
Masculine noun, bare singular as accusative direct object of 'haben'.
Preposition governing genitive; introduces a causal PP.
Definite article, genitive masculine singular; determiner for 'Lärms'.
Masculine noun, genitive singular; object of the preposition 'wegen'.

sentences.target: Sie klärt den Streit beim Abendessen.

translations.de: Sie klärt den Streit beim Abendessen.
translations.en: She settles the argument at dinner.
translations.es: Ella resuelve la discusión en la cena.
translations.fr: Elle règle la dispute pendant le dîner.
translations.it: Lei mette fine alla discussione a cena.
translations.ko: 그녀는 저녁 식사 때 싸움을 마무리한다.
translations.zh-Hans: 她在晚饭时化解了争吵。
translations.yue: 佢喺晚餐時化解咗個爭拗。
translations.pt: Ela resolve a discussão no jantar.
translations.he: היא מיישבת את המריבה בארוחת הערב.
translations.vi: Cô ấy giải quyết cuộc cãi vã trong bữa tối.
translations.nl: Zij legt de ruzie bij tijdens het avondeten.
translations.hi: वह रात के खाने के दौरान झगड़ा सुलझा देती है।
translations.el: Εκείνη βάζει τέλος στον καβγά στο δείπνο.
translations.nb: Hun får slutt på krangelen under middagen.
translations.id: Dia menyelesaikan pertengkaran saat makan malam.
translations.ja: 彼女は夕食の席で口論を収める。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, nominative; with 3rd sg verb 'klärt'; ambiguous between 'she' and formal 'you'.
Finite lexical verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive, taking 'den Streit' as direct object.
Definite article, accusative masculine singular; determiner for 'Streit'.
Masculine noun, accusative singular; direct object of 'klärt'.
Fused preposition ('bei' + 'dem'); introduces a dative PP giving setting/time.
Neuter noun, dative singular; object of 'bei' in the PP 'beim Abendessen'.

Sie klärt den Streit beim Abendessen.

The argument is over now, thankfully.
We’re arguing again because of the noise.
She settles the argument at dinner.
